blocks.body: Get-passive is a spoken version of the passive with get + V3 instead of be + V3. Used for unexpected events, changes in state, often with a negative or emotional tone: get married, get fired, get hurt, get lost.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "Get-passive: get + V3 is a spoken version of the passive.", "Use for unexpected events, changes in state, often with a negative connotation.", "Typical expressions: get married, get fired, get hurt, get lost, get stuck.", "Get is tense: get/gets/got/will get/have got + V3.", "Be passive is neutral, get passive is dynamic, conversational.", "Avoid get-passive in formal writing and documents." ] }
